title:
Lieta Nr. C30786621, SKC-565/2023. The decision of 6 September 2023 by the Supreme Court of the Republic of Latvia. ,

Latvia
text:
Person A owns figurative trade marks No M
74 149 and No M 75 261 registered with respect to, inter alia, services in
Class 37: dismantling of built structures, dismantling and demolition of
buildings. The signs consist of the word element ‘Demontāža.lv’ and a
black image of an excavator within an orange rhombus, and Person A had
transferred them to the applicant under a licence agreement. The applicant
brought an action for the prevention of the infringement of the right to the
trade mark, requesting the application of the final injunction and stating that
the defendant used in the course of trade a confusingly similar figurative sign
consisting of the word element ‘Ēku demontāža'.
issuing_authority: Supreme Court of the Republic of Latvia
